analysis.name: Aerodrome Finance
analysis.summary: AERO近期因协议催化、回购及Base生态热度上涨14.5%，但距历史高点仍跌78%，需关注解锁风险及市场情绪。

recommendation.invalidation: 跌破0.45美元或出现重大安全事件

catalysts: 协议回购与流动性激励

latestNews.title: Revolutionary Aerodrome and Velodrome Merge Creates New DeFi Powerhouse - CryptoRank

fundamentals: Base链上核心AMM，继承Velodrome V2机制
ve(3,3)治理模型，锁仓投票获取费用
总供应量19.2亿，流通9.57亿，流通率约50%
marketRead: 24小时涨幅14.8%，7日涨幅38.8%，成交量放大
价格仍处历史低位，距ATH跌78%
Binance数据受限，需从其他交易所获取
risks: 大量未解锁代币（约50%总供应）带来抛压
安全事件历史可能影响信心
DeFi竞争激烈，协议收入依赖TVL
watchlist: 解锁时间表及实际抛售情况
sourceNotes: Binance API受限，行情数据来自CoinMarketCap
新闻来源包括CoinMarketCap、CoinDesk等，时效性不一

profile.name: Aerodrome Finance
profile.description: Aerodrome Finance is a next-generation AMM designed to serve as Base's central liquidity hub, combining a powerful liquidity incentive engine, vote-lock governance model, and friendly user experience. Aerodrome inherits the latest features from Velodrome V2.
